productDisplayName: Nike Women Sweet Classic Leather White Shoes
description: This vintage style nike Sweet Classic Leather shoe is a perfect fusion of street fashion and tennis glam. Designed for the tennis lover but crafted to look great on everybody these shoes blend function and fashion effortlessly, to make you look fabulous on and off the court.UpperSynthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot Mildly padded collar with an embroidered logo on the backLacing system for a snug, cutomised FitPadded tongue for comfortSynthetic leather and mesh fabric lining for comfort and breathabilityMidsoleEVA midsole for advanced cushioningOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the durable outsole for enhanced grip and tractionLeaf patterened herringbone grooves on the forefoot for better grip during toe offShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
